_comment: File cấu hình cho process_voice_videos.py. Mỗi entry trong 'videos' là 1 video cần xử lý.

settings._section: === CẤU HÌNH CHUNG (áp dụng cho tất cả video nếu không override) ===

videos.audio_script: A China watch factory just got leaked… and I'm not sugarcoating this. I paid 50 to 70 dollars — full Rolex box, packaging, tags… everything included. And you're still paying hundreds? That's on you. Information is out there — you just didn't look. Now you know. I sell supplier lists worldwide — this is exactly what you get. Comment vendor and I'll send it.
videos.text:
Comment "vendor"
to get my vendor
and my vendor list
videos._note: Các key dưới đây là tùy chọn – nếu để trống thì dùng giá trị trong settings
